empathetic_output.support_response: We value your business and want to make things right immediately. Our team will investigate this issue promptly and provide you with an updated estimated delivery date for the correct product as soon as possible. In addition, we may require further information from you to ensure that everything goes smoothly. Please don't hesitate to reach back out should you have any questions or concerns.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out about my order ORD-4510 for the SmartHome Hub Pro, which I purchased as a birthday gift for my wife with express shipping since her birthday is in just two days. However, when I opened the box in front of my family, I was surprised and disappointed to find a coffee maker inside instead of the SmartHome Hub Pro. I would greatly appreciate it if you could look into this matter urgently and arrange for the correct item to be shipped to me as soon as possible. Could you please let me know the expected delivery time for the correct order and any additional steps I need to take?

Please allow us some time to verify the details of your purchase and arrange for the replacement of the incorrect item. Thank you for choosing our brand; we value your business and hope to resolve this situation satisfactorily.
